scripts.start: NODE_ENV=development node ../scripts/enforce-env-policy.mjs dev && npx expo start --port 18081
scripts.start:tunnel: NODE_ENV=development node ../scripts/enforce-env-policy.mjs dev && npx expo start --tunnel --port 18081 --clear
scripts.start:lan: NODE_ENV=development node ../scripts/enforce-env-policy.mjs dev && npx expo start --lan --port 18081 --clear
scripts.start:restart:18081: pkill -f "expo start" || true && NODE_ENV=development node ../scripts/enforce-env-policy.mjs dev && npx expo start --port 18081 --lan
scripts.start:ci: NODE_ENV=development node ../scripts/enforce-env-policy.mjs dev && CI=1 npx expo start --port 18081 --localhost --clear
scripts.ota:production: NODE_ENV=production node ../scripts/require-macbook.mjs && NODE_ENV=production node ../scripts/enforce-env-policy.mjs release && NODE_ENV=production npx eas-cli update --branch production --message "nexora-ota-production"
scripts.ota:preview: NODE_ENV=production node ../scripts/require-macbook.mjs && NODE_ENV=production node ../scripts/enforce-env-policy.mjs release && NODE_ENV=production npx eas-cli update --branch preview --message "nexora-ota-preview"
scripts.release:apk: NODE_ENV=production node ../scripts/require-macbook.mjs && NODE_ENV=production node ../scripts/enforce-env-policy.mjs release && cd android && NODE_ENV=production ./gradlew assembleRelease -x externalNativeBuildDebug && cd .. && NODE_ENV=production node ../scripts/cleanup-old-apks.mjs
